zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil de Cormeilles於大約1193年出生在英國賀福爾塔林頓時，她的父親Walter de Cormeilles38歲，母親Aubreda Marmion38歲。她和Hugh de Gifford至少有5個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1278年在英國維爾爾波頓享年86歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil de Cormeilles was born about 1193, in Tarrington, Herefordshire, England, her father, Walter de Cormeilles, was 38 and her mother, Aubreda Marmion, was 38. She had at least 5 sons and 6 daughters with Hugh de Gifford. She died in 1278, in Boyton, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 86.

Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles avec Hugh de Gifford. Elle est décédée en 1278, à Boyton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil de Cormeillesが約1193年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアターリントンで生まれた時，父Walter de Cormeillesは38歳，母Aubreda Marmionは38歳であった。彼女はHugh de Giffordとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1278年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアボイトンで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil de Cormeilles(이)가 대략 1193년 영국 허퍼드실르 터아링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter de Cormeilles(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aubreda Marmion(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 Hugh de Gifford(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1278년 영국 윌츠히르 보이턴에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil de Cormeilles родилась около 1193 г. в местности таррингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter de Cormeilles было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Aubreda Marmion, 38. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Hugh de Gifford. Она умерла в 1278 г. в местности боитон, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет.
